ai-agents-business.title: AI Agents for Business: Automating the Routine
ai-agents-business.excerpt: How LLM-based AI agents help companies automate processes and save resources.
ai-agents-business.content:
Artificial intelligence is no longer a technology of the future — today AI agents actively help businesses solve everyday tasks. From automatic request processing to intelligent data analysis — companies are increasingly adopting AI solutions.

## What is an AI Agent?

An AI agent is a program based on a large language model (LLM) that can independently perform tasks: answer customer questions, analyze documents, generate reports, and even make decisions within given rules.

## Use Cases

**HR Automation** — the bot screens resumes, conducts initial interviews, and creates candidate shortlists. Our project for Ucell reduced application processing time from 3 days to 4 hours.

**Customer Service** — an AI agent handles up to 80% of typical requests without operator involvement, learning from ticket history.

**Analytics** — the agent automatically collects data from various sources, finds anomalies, and generates daily reports.

## How to Get Started?

1. Identify processes with high routine volume
2. Assess the quality of existing data
3. Choose a pilot project with measurable results
4. Start with an MVP and iterate

At IVN Labs, we help companies implement AI agents — from consultation to production-ready solutions.

nextjs-performance.title: Next.js Performance Optimization: Complete Guide
nextjs-performance.excerpt: 10 practical tips for speeding up Next.js apps: from server components to smart caching.
nextjs-performance.content:
Next.js has become the standard for React development, but without proper optimization even a powerful framework can run slowly. We share experience from real projects.

## 1. Server Components by Default

In App Router, all components are server-side by default. Use `'use client'` only when you truly need interactivity.

## 2. Dynamic Imports

Load heavy libraries (charts, 3D, editors) via `dynamic()` with `ssr: false`.

## 3. Image Optimization

Always use `next/image` — automatic WebP, lazy loading and responsive sizes.

## 4. Route Segments

Use `loading.tsx` and `Suspense` for parallel data loading.

## 5. Caching

Next.js caches fetch requests on the server. Control via `revalidate` and `cache: 'no-store'`.

## 6. Bundle Analysis

Regularly check your bundle with `@next/bundle-analyzer` — find and eliminate heavy dependencies.

## 7. Font Optimization

Use `next/font` for automatic self-hosting of fonts without CLS.

## 8. Middleware

Minimize logic in middleware — it runs on every request.

## 9. Edge Runtime

For API routes with simple logic, use Edge Runtime — faster and cheaper.

## 10. Monitoring

Implement Web Vitals monitoring via `reportWebVitals` to track real performance.

Our team specializes in high-performance Next.js applications — contact us for an audit.

crm-mistakes.title: 5 CRM Implementation Mistakes That Cost Millions
crm-mistakes.excerpt: Why 60% of CRM projects fail and how to avoid typical implementation mistakes.
crm-mistakes.content:
Statistics show that over 60% of CRM implementation projects fail to achieve their goals. Let's break down the main mistakes we see in our clients.

## Mistake 1: CRM for CRM's Sake

Companies buy a system because "everyone has one" without clearly understanding which processes need automation. The result — an expensive address book.

**How to avoid:** start with a business process audit and define 3-5 key metrics the CRM should improve.

## Mistake 2: Ignoring Users

CRM is chosen by management without involving end users. Managers sabotage the system, returning to Excel.

**How to avoid:** involve future users in selection and setup from day one.

## Mistake 3: Trying to Automate Chaos

If processes aren't formalized, CRM won't save them. Automating chaos produces automated chaos.

**How to avoid:** first describe and optimize processes, then automate.

## Mistake 4: Big Bang Instead of Phased Rollout

Launching all modules simultaneously is guaranteed stress and failure.

**How to avoid:** start with one department or process, achieve results, then scale.

## Mistake 5: No Integrations

A CRM not connected to 1C, telephony, and email is an isolated island.

**How to avoid:** plan integrations from day one. APIs and webhooks are your best friends.

At IVN Labs, we specialize in CRMs that actually work. Contact us for a consultation.

telegram-bots-2024.title: Telegram Bot Trends in 2024: What Works
telegram-bots-2024.excerpt: Mini Apps, AI integrations, payments — breaking down current Telegram bot development trends.
telegram-bots-2024.content:
Telegram remains the main business messenger in Central Asia. Here's what we see in bot development trends.

## Mini Apps — The New Standard

Telegram Mini Apps allow creating full-fledged web applications inside the messenger. Perfect for:
- Catalogs and stores
- Forms and surveys
- Dashboards and analytics

## AI-Powered Bots

Integration with GPT and other LLMs makes bots truly smart:
- Understanding conversation context
- Generating personalized responses
- Working with documents and images

## Payments via Stars

Telegram Stars open new monetization opportunities:
- Digital goods and subscriptions
- Content micropayments
- Donations and support

## Business Automation

The most demanded scenario:
- Receiving and processing applications
- Notifications and alerts
- CRM and 1C integration
- HR automation

## 2024 Stack

Our recommended stack:
- **Python** + aiogram/python-telegram-bot
- **PostgreSQL** for storage
- **Redis** for cache and states
- **Docker** for deployment

We've built dozens of business bots — from simple notifiers to AI assistants with 10K+ users.

design-system.title: How We Build Design Systems for Products
design-system.excerpt: Experience building scalable design systems: from tokens to component libraries.
design-system.content:
A design system is not a set of buttons in Figma — it's a living tool that accelerates development and ensures consistency.

## Why a Design System?

- Speeds up development 2-3x
- Ensures unified style
- Simplifies onboarding new developers
- Reduces UI bugs

## Our Approach

### 1. Design Tokens

Everything starts with tokens: colors, typography, spacing, radii, shadows. We use CSS Custom Properties for theme support.

### 2. Component Architecture

Atomic design: atoms → molecules → organisms → templates → pages.

### 3. Dark and Light Themes

Theme support from day one via CSS variables and `data-theme` attribute.

### 4. Responsive Design

Mobile-first approach with smooth adaptation.

### 5. Animations

Framer Motion for product animations respecting `prefers-reduced-motion`.

## Tools

- **Figma** — design and prototyping
- **Storybook** — component documentation
- **CSS Custom Properties** — tokens
- **Framer Motion** — animations

Every product we build starts with a design system — it's an investment that pays off in the very first sprint.

it-park-experience.title: Our Experience at IT Park Uzbekistan
it-park-experience.excerpt: How IT Park resident status helps us and our clients: tax benefits, networking, and growth.
it-park-experience.content:
IVN Labs is an official resident of IT Park Uzbekistan. We share our experience and advantages.

## What Does Residency Offer?

### Tax Benefits
- 0% income tax
- 0% VAT on IT service exports
- 7.5% unified social payment (instead of standard 12%)

### Infrastructure
- Modern office spaces
- High-speed internet
- Conference rooms and meeting zones

### Networking
- 1000+ resident companies
- Regular meetups and hackathons
- Access to mentors and investors

## How to Become a Resident?

1. Submit an application on the IT Park website
2. Describe your project and business plan
3. Pass commission review (2-4 weeks)
4. Receive resident status

## Our Experience

Residency helped us:
- Reduce costs by 30%
- Attract major clients
- Enter international markets
- Hire top specialists

IT Park is not just a coworking space — it's an ecosystem for IT business growth in Uzbekistan. If you're an IT company, we strongly recommend applying.
